title: centranthus ruber subsp. junceus
intro: Centranthus ruber subsp. junceus, also known as Red Valerian, is a flowering plant in the valerian family (Valerianaceae) that is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness due to its sedative and antispasmodic effects. The plant is rich in valerenic acid, which is believed to have a calming effect on the nervous system, thereby providing various health benefits such as reducing stress and promoting relaxation. The herbal preparations of Centranthus ruber subsp. junceus include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
